title: Castle Tower
description: This mod adds a brand-new Castle Tower to Forest biomes.
body:
Castle Tower Structure

This mod adds a brand-new Castle Tower to Forest biomes.

![Castle Tower Front View](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8386f6fd3475f0c3759e97f0cad41a7d28adcbb6.jpeg)
![Castle Tower Inside Bridge View](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0940fcebc0fbeafc93516122ffb689242299546d.jpeg)
Castle Tower:

A small but sturdy stone tower rising proudly in the landscape.
Perfect for adventurers seeking a strategic vantage point, with loot inside to discover.
You are free to include this mod in your modpacks
